Commercial

The gym that grows your clinic

Spectrum is the premier provider of custom sensory gyms for pediatric OT, PT, ABA, and SLP clinics across North America. Every gym is purpose-engineered around your clinical workflow — designed to maximize therapist efficiency, patient outcomes, and your bottom line.

  • Installed over a single weekend — no therapy downtime
  • Designed to maximize referrals and billable sessions
  • Serves OT, PT, ABA, SLP and more from one space
  • See full ROI breakdown on our Investor page
View the ROI Calculator →
Residential

Bring the clinic home

Many of your patients need sensory support beyond clinic hours. We partner with pediatric therapists to design home gyms that reinforce clinical goals — giving families a therapeutic space that keeps progress going every single day.

  • Designed in coordination with your child's therapy team
  • Reinforces OT, PT, and ABA goals between clinic sessions
  • Installed in one day — zero disruption to your family
  • 0% financing available for up to 12 months

FAQ

Questions? We've got answers.

A sensory gym is a room designed for active sensory play including equipment providing proprioceptive and vestibular input — swings, trampolines, rock walls, ball pits, monkey bars, and more. They help children develop motor skills in a fun, therapeutic environment.

Our gyms are designed to support OT sensory integration, PT gross motor development, ABA behavioral programming, and SLP — all from one shared space. We design the layout around your clinic's specific disciplines and patient population.

Commercial clinic installs are completed over a single weekend so there is zero disruption to your therapy schedule. Home installs are done in one day. Larger facilities may take up to two weeks.

Most clinics recoup their full investment within 12–18 months through increased billable sessions, new CPT codes, and a significant boost in referrals. Visit our Investor page for a full breakdown of projected ROI.

Yes — we offer 0% interest financing for up to 12 months with fixed monthly payments to qualifying clinics and families.

We are based in Bear Creek, Wisconsin and install custom sensory gyms in pediatric clinics, hospitals, schools, and homes across all of North America.
